title: Prose card (micro-story / short narrative)
description: Machine-read source of truth for a short prose piece — a micro-story or narrative 'card' meant to be embedded in an app, posted, or printed on a story card, at projects/{slug}/prose/{lang}/{slug}.prose.json. This is the lightweight vertical for plain narrative text that does NOT need the audio-story scaffolding (no voices/sounds/cues, no TTS-safety gate, no runtime gate). The reader-facing copy is rendered from this into a sibling .md. The deterministic gate (scripts/check-prose.mjs) enforces only the mechanical facts: a sane title, a CJK-aware length band, and — when a compliance block is present — a ZH 极限词/承诺词 scan. Whether the story is GOOD (voice, arc, payoff) stays with content-review.

prose_id.description: Stable slug; matches the filename basename.

language.description: BCP-ish code, e.g. 'en' or 'zh'. Drives CJK-aware length counting and the compliance scan.

keyword.description: Optional topic the piece serves (ideally backed by a *.research.json with decision: pursue).

title.description: Card title. The gate caps it (default 40 units) so it stays a title, not a paragraph.

summary.description: Optional one-line hook/teaser rendered as a blockquote above the body (not length-gated).

body.description: The prose itself (paragraphs separated by blank lines). Gate enforces a CJK-aware length band (default 60..800 units; a 汉字 or a Latin word each count 1).

tags.description: Optional topic tags WITHOUT the leading # (the renderer adds it).

length.description: OPTIONAL per-piece override of the gate's length band (in CJK-aware units).

compliance.description: OPTIONAL — present this block to OPT IN to the ZH 极限词/承诺词 scan (off by default, so fiction that legitimately uses 最/第一 in dialogue isn't false-tripped). Use it for marketing/branded prose cards.

industries.description: High-risk-industry promise-word sets to add (e.g. education/medical/finance), same vocabulary as the other ZH gates.
